title: Limit function length
description: Functions that grow too large tend to accumulate multiple responsibilities and become harder to understand, test, and maintain. Long functions violate the single responsibility principle and increase complexity.
recommendation: Refactor large functions into smaller, focused functions with well-defined responsibilities.

noncompliant.description: A single function handling multiple responsibilities: validation, database operations, email sending, and logging.

compliant.description: Large function broken down into smaller, focused functions with single responsibilities.
